manual_entries.title: ABB Ground Control Cable Shield 360 Degrees
manual_entries.summary: Ground the external shield of the control cable 360 degrees on the grounding rack under the clamp.

zh.title: ABB 控制电缆屏蔽层 360 度接地
zh.summary: 应在接地夹下方的接地架上，对控制电缆外屏蔽层进行 360 度接地。

structured_payload.guidance: 在接地夹下方的接地架上，对控制电缆外屏蔽层进行 360 度接地。
Ground the external shield of the control cable 360 degrees on the grounding rack under the clamp

doc.file_name: ABB ACH531 HVAC Control Program Firmware Manual.pdf

chunk.cleaned_text: For control cables, ground the external shield 360 degrees on the grounding rack under the grounding clamp.
chunk.text_excerpt: ground the external shield 360 degrees on the grounding rack

evidence.evidence_text: 对于控制电缆，在接地夹下方的接地架上对电缆的外屏蔽层进行360度接地

manual_entries.title: Siemens Backup Drive Settings After Commissioning
manual_entries.summary: After commissioning, back up the inverter settings to external storage media.

zh.title: Siemens 调试后备份变频器设置
zh.summary: 调试完成后，应将变频器参数设置备份到外部存储介质。

structured_payload.step: 调试完成后，将变频器设置备份到外部存储介质
Back up the drive settings to storage media after commissioning

chunk.cleaned_text: After commissioning, upload and back up the drive settings to external storage media.
chunk.text_excerpt: upload and back up the drive settings to external storage media

evidence.evidence_text: 调试后，设置会永久保存到变频器中。建议通过上传将设置额外备份到变频器以外的存储介质中
